question: Will AI cause a recession before 2030?
description: Resolves YES if a recession beginning in 2024-2029 is widely attributed to AI labour displacement in mainstream financial press.

question: Will OpenAI release GPT-6 by Dec 31 2026?
description: Resolves YES on OpenAI blog post announcing GPT-6.

question: Will a lunar landing happen before 2030?
description: Resolves YES if any human returns to the lunar surface before Jan 1 2030.

question: Will the WHO declare a new pandemic before 2027?
description: Resolves YES on a public WHO pandemic declaration.

question: Will Anthropic release Claude 5 in 2026?
description: Resolves YES if Anthropic ships Claude 5 in 2026.

question: Will the Fed cut rates at least twice in 2026?
description: Resolves YES if the FOMC cuts the federal funds rate at least twice in calendar 2026.

question: Will Nvidia announce a $5T market cap before 2027?
description: Resolves YES if NVDA closes at a market cap > $5 trillion on any trading day before Jan 1 2027.

question: Will the S&P 500 close above 7000 in 2026?
description: Resolves YES if SPX closes above 7000 on any trading day in calendar 2026.

question: Will a new infectious disease X outbreak be declared by WHO in 2026?
description: Resolves YES if WHO declares Disease X a public health emergency.

question: Will humans land on Mars before 2032?
description: Resolves YES if any human sets foot on Mars before Jan 1 2032.
